case_title: JOSHUA WYTHE et al VS. JAMES RIGNEY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY WYTHE, JOSHUA WOLSCHLAGER, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT RIGNEY, JAMES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-12-2011 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WYTHE, JOSHUA WOLSCHLAGER, MICHELLE AS TO DEFENDANT RIGNEY, JAMES
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RIGNEY, JAMES

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2011 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO OCT-27-2011 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFFS ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S, VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEFENDANT JAMES RIGNEY ON SEPTEMBER 19, 2011 BY PERSONAL SERVICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF WYTHE, JOSHUA WOLSCHLAGER, MICHELLE
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-27-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-27-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-27-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WYTHE, JOSHUA WOLSCHLAGER, MICHELLE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RIGNEY, JAMES $4,850.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,010.00, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST PLAINTIFF'S JUDGMENT FOR ANY AMOUNT DEFENDANT HAS ALEARDY PAID PLAINTIFFS. STATUTORY DAMAGES ($500.00) UNDER CC 1950.5 ARE AWARDED DUE TO DEFENDANT'S BAD FAITH RETENTION OF PLAINTIFF'S SECURITY DEPOSIT AND FAILURE TO PROVIDE AN ACCOUNTING UNTIL AFERT THE PLAINTIFFS FILED SUIT IN SMALL CLAIMS COURT, 4 1/2 MONTHS AFTER THE TERMINATION OF THE TENANCY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT RIGNEY, JAMES
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT RIGNEY, JAMES
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FROM PLAINTIFF MICHELLE WOLSCHLAGER RECEIVED.
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FROM JOSHUA WYTHE RECEIVED.
JUDGMENT CREDITORS REQUEST FOR FUNDS FORWARDED TO ACCOUNTING DEPT.
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $4,850.00 RE 29539 FOR TRANSACTION W0511B02D003 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO J WHYTHE AND M WOLSCHLAGER, DOC#1904361951, WARRANT #38201445, DATED MAR-15-2012
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $160.00 RE 29539 FOR TRANSACTION W0511B02D003 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO J WYTHE AND M WOLSCHLAGER, DOC #1904361951, WARRANT #38201445, DATED MAR-15-2012
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
